summary: Endgame route to the Rivergate arch — the stone door at the source of the river. The green dragon waits here. Rivers arrives with all four proofs; fight, catch, or walk up unarmed.
flavor_beats: Wild at the west bank: tall reeds, shallow pools.
A deep-water channel threads east-to-west; a sandbar path crosses it.
At the north end, the Rivergate arch is carved with the shapes of the four wardens' stones.
The arch hums. Rivers feels it in their teeth from the southernmost tile.
